message:
🐛 Rewrite 10 inaccurate CNCF install missions with correct methods

Each mission had fundamentally wrong install methods, wrong Helm repos,
or treated CLI tools as Kubernetes deployments:

- karmada: Use official Helm repo (raw.githubusercontent.com/karmada-io)
  or karmadactl CLI, not fabricated kubectl apply URLs
- knative: Use kubectl apply with YAML manifests from GitHub releases,
  not a non-existent Helm chart from mesosphere.github.io
- kserve: Use kubectl apply --server-side from GitHub releases or OCI
  Helm charts (ghcr.io/kserve), not rock8s.com third-party charts
- kubeedge: Use official Helm repo (kubeedge.io/charts) or keadm CLI,
  not web-seven.github.io third-party charts
- kubevela: Use official Helm repo (kubevela.github.io/charts) with
  vela-core chart in vela-system namespace, not kubegems third-party
- linkerd: Use two-chart install (linkerd-crds + linkerd-control-plane)
  from helm.linkerd.io with TLS certificates, not a single chart from
  cloudnativeapp.github.io
- porter: Rewrite as CLI tool install (cdn.porter.sh scripts), not a
  fabricated Kubernetes Helm deployment from kubesphere.io
- radius: Use rad CLI (install.sh + rad init), not a fabricated Helm
  chart from p2p-org.github.io
- volcano: Use official Helm repo (volcano-sh.github.io/helm-charts),
  not kubegems third-party charts
- strimzi: Use OCI Helm chart (quay.io/strimzi-helm) as preferred
  method, add complete uninstall/upgrade commands

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
